decision: Climbed Row017 with an independent local ComfyUI MF70 pupils_iris_sclera v3 runtime + direct whole-frame visual QA (canonical pass), and emitted a pass review for historical pupils_iris_sclera v3 seed210811. This does not complete historical normalization.
remaining_blocker: Row017 cannot complete until remaining historical localized visual-review records are classified into canonical pre/post, target, non-target, six-category, and global-rejection evidence, and future localized candidates continue to clear whole-frame rejection gates.
next_action: Continue bounded Row017 historical localized canonicalization with additional local artifacts/runtime candidates (e.g. skin_tone_continuity or a fresh eyelids runtime climb), or climb another tracker-authorized local visual/audio lane away from Row069-071.
